title: The Highlander.
content:
Right about, left about,
        Halt and stand at ease!
    Shoulder arms, attention,
        Steady, if you please.

    Order arms, present arms,
        Forward, by your right!
    Double, double, double,
        Double to the fight!
meaning:
Richard Hunter's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Highlander."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
